section_plan.name: Intro
section_plan.description: sparse setup, establish the core groove without full drums

section_plan.name: Chorus
section_plan.description: main hook, fuller drums, strongest motif, higher energy

section_plan.name: Verse
section_plan.description: reduced arrangement, new melodic movement, groove stays steady

section_plan.name: Chorus
section_plan.description: return of the hook with extra layers, fills, and wider energy

section_plan.name: Verse
section_plan.description: second variation, different instrument focus, controlled tension

section_plan.name: Outro
section_plan.description: strip down the groove and resolve cleanly
